---
title: "NFL EDA - G"
author: "Gabe Macklem"
date: "2024-11-13"
output: html_document
---


# EDA for Gabe to work on to avoid repo desync

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(broom)
library(GGally)
library(tidyr)
library(tidymodels) 
library(kknn)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggh4x)
```
